name: FctsIdsPrmRateAgeCatExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT PDRA_REF_DTM, PDRA_AGE_FROM, PDRA_PREM_1, PDRA_PREM_2, PDRA_PREM_3, PDRA_PREM_4, PDRA_PREM_5, PDRA_PREM_6, PDRA_AGE_THRU FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_PDRA_RATE_AGES

Description:
*****************************************************************************************************************************************************************************
COPYRIGHT 2005, 2006, 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

Job Name : FctsPrmRateAgeCatExtr
                           
PROCESSING:
    Pulls the Premium Rating infromation that is used to populate the IDS Premium Rating table within the Premium Rating Model. 
   Dates are not used as a criteria for which records are pulled.   The whole table is extracted.
